title: As Vance Offers Iran ‘Outstretched Hand’ in Talks, Trump Threatens Bombing
summary_full: The administration’s split message came as the United States and Iran began a new round of nuclear negotiations in Switzerland.
summary_public: The administration’s split message came as the United States and Iran began a new round of nuclear negotiations in Switzerland.
